overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked futuristic city at night. The scene features dense neon signage, holographic advertisements, and wet streets reflecting the vibrant cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under transit overpass with digital displays

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the overpass, approaching the open intersection ahead

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass covering the walkway with support pillars
massive curved digital screen displaying abstract green and blue patterns
large red neon sign with stylized lettering on building facade
tall metal pole with attached signage and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive transit overpass with a curved digital billboard overhead displaying cyan patterns. The camera moves forward along wet asphalt pavement toward a red neon sign, with the covered walkway gradually opening up to the intersection ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with cylindrical advertising tower

events.description: exits covered overpass into open intersection with full view of the cylindrical ad tower
begins crossing the wide intersection toward the cylindrical tower

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane intersection while approaching the prominent cylindrical building covered in advertisements

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in multiple layers of digital billboards and neon advertisements
yellow neon sign reading 'EL DORADO GUN SHOP' on the cylindrical tower
corporate signage for Kiroshi Optics on the advertising tower
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass, the scene opens into a vast intersection dominated by a cylindrical tower covered in holographic ads. The camera crosses the wet asphalt marked with yellow crosswalk stripes, passing a futuristic sedan while approaching the El Dorado Gun Shop signage on the central tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with dense neon advertising

events.description: player character in white jacket becomes visible in third-person view
blue sports car passes by on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: the player character, wearing a white jacket and carrying a bag, walks across the intersection while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: player character walking steadily across the crosswalk, visible from behind in third-person perspective
blue futuristic sports car with headlights on driving through the intersection

entered.detail: sleek blue futuristic vehicle with illuminated headlights reflecting on wet pavement
ground-level shop windows with neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The player character becomes visible in third-person view while crossing the wide intersection. A blue sports car passes nearby as the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic. The cylindrical ad tower shifts to the right side of the frame while storefront displays become visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with dense vertical signage

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues along the commercial street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs, maintaining a steady walking pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction past the player character

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screens mounted on building facades displaying advertisements
metal and concrete seating along the sidewalk edge
lit entrance structure leading to another section of the commercial district

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues along the sidewalk lined with vertical billboards and street furniture. The cylindrical ad tower recedes into the distance on the right while new neon storefronts and an illuminated archway ahead define the dense commercial environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a transit overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath a curved digital billboard with cyan patterns, moving along wet asphalt as the covered walkway gradually opens toward a wide intersection. As the camera emerges from the overpass, the scene expands to reveal a vast crossing dominated by a cylindrical tower of holographic advertisements, passing a futuristic sedan and yellow crosswalk stripes. The perspective then shifts to a third-person view of the character navigating through pedestrian traffic and passing a blue sports car, while the ad tower slides to the right to reveal glowing storefronts on the left. Finally, the character continues along a sidewalk lined with vertical billboards, leaving the tower behind as they move toward an illuminated archway and a dense array of neon shops.
